rag_rules: Place AGREE contracts in component type scopes for port assumptions/guarantees, and implementation scopes for subcomponent bindings.
Use annex agree {** ... **}; blocks for AGREE content, with type scopes for constants and equations, implementation scopes for assignments.
generic_rules: Ensure AGREE expressions use only visible identifiers and preserve type consistency.
Use valid AGREE syntax: assume, guarantee, eq, const, assign with proper logical operators.
Avoid referencing implementation-only subcomponents in component type contracts.
Do not introduce package-qualified identifiers not present in the model.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in annex agree {** ... **}; blocks.
Use initialized temporal recurrence for stateful equations and nested if-then-else for branching logic.
Constants and equations should be declared with correct scalar types: int, real, bool.
anti_patterns: Do not place implementation-level bindings in component type scopes.
Do not reference AADL properties as AGREE variables unless explicitly exposed as ports or constants.
irrelevant_topics: AADL property associations and timing parameters not tied to visible features
Specific requirement traceability and model fusion insertion locations
